data.name: Pleasure Room - Haunted Apartment
data.detailed_description:
The Story

Rumor says Room 404 can stir your deepest desires — a place where lonely hearts dream of being touched.

After your death, you awaken as the ghost bound to that very room, watching new tenants move in, each carrying their own longing and fear. You can comfort them, or haunt them.

The Characters

Core Features

Different Characters, Different Desires

Every renter has their own secret preferences and emotional triggers.

Your task as the ghost is to observe, learn, and act — discover what they crave to make them stay… or push them away forever.

Animated LEWD and SEX Scenes

Beautifully animated sequences that bring the most intimate dreams to life — each reflecting the renter’s personality and your choices. 

Dream & Nightmare Sequences

Track your tenant’s emotional state. High Heart unlocks fantasy dream scenes, high Fear unlocks nightmare sequences. Each dream or nightmare is split into multiple stages. Unlock the next scene by reaching the right emotional threshold or replaying with different approaches.​

 Interactive Apartment

​​​Use doors, mirrors, showers, beds, lights, and everyday items to haunt creatively.

data.short_description: A choice-driven haunting game where every action shifts Heart or Fear, leading tenants to stay, leave, or dream of you in unexpected ways.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/8.1/10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound card
  • VR 支援: None
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Dedicated GPU with 1 GB VRAM (NVIDIA GeForce GT 730 / AMD equivalent or better)
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound card
  • VR 支援: None
